finding: No standalone `selftest` verb exists: `hexa selftest` -> 'unknown subcommand selftest'. `hexa test` has a --selftest-only flag but needs a target .hexa with @test fns.
conclusion: M4 cannot be flipped [x]: there is no `hexa selftest` regression gate to turn green (unknown subcommand). The toolchain itself runs fine (direct `hexa run` rc=0, prints SELFTEST_OK) and the cloud unit tests pass (guard rc=2), but the LITERAL named gate does not exist. Honest [ ].
